issues.detail: The skill does not address error scenarios or edge cases for incomplete or ambiguous user input.

scenarios.name: Review a $30K custom learning-platform build for a small course business
scenarios.rationale: Treatment surfaces default-alive vs default-dead, the seven-question decision table, a minimalist swap (Teachable/Circle) and a one-week validation; baseline gives generic SaaS advice without the framework structure or output format.

scenarios.name: Decide whether to make a $45K full-time support hire at $8K MRR
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs the seven-question table, computes the 47%-of-revenue burn, recommends part-time contractor + help-center triage, and gives a this-week tagging experiment; baseline omits the default-dead math and the staged-hire minimalist version.
